title: TISS Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for 06 District and Research Coordinators Posts
description: The Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 06 District and Research Coordinators and Program Coordinator Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their Post-graduation can apply for the TISS Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in offline mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, ...
